form.formComment: Encouraging debut won by a nose this track on March 14 over 3400m defeating Bay Runner with 71kg at $10. Likely improver going over the jumps this time.

form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. Only had one start last when he was finished second of 12 starters at Bartlemy P2p on May 11 over 4828m, 2 len behind Homegrown Hero carrying 57.5kg. Looks a definite winning chance.

form.formComment: Returning from a spell making his jumps debut. He ended last campaign with finished 14th of 15 starters at this track on January 15 over 3400m, 73 len behind Ronnie Russet with 70kg at $251 and before that made ground from midfield; finished tenth of 11 starters at this track on December 11 over 3400m, 23 len behind Ronnie Russet carrying 68.5kg at $23. Tough task ahead.

form.formComment: Resuming today after three months. Finished off last campaign 3 in a small field at Ballycrystal P2p January 18 over 4828m, slow track; 6 len behind Lord Desart carrying 61kg.
